payload.label: pillow
payload.long_description: Close-up (~0.5 m) of an off-white rectangular bed pillow with wrinkled, linen-like fabric, visible seam/piping and horizontal crease lines; pillow is partially cropped at the image edge and shows light shadowing along folds.
